---
title: Nouvel an chinois, Paris 13
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784039590/nouvelanchinois_oekuib.png
description: Nouvel an chinois, Paris 13, porte de Choisy
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2025/02/09
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784039590/nouvelanchinois_oekuib.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
